use_cases: Playing audio books with chapter navigation and progress tracking
Adjusting playback speed for personalized listening experience
Seeking through audio content to specific timestamps
Embedding a persistent audio player in web applications
ai_summary: A floating audio book player component with play/pause controls, progress slider, chapter display, and adjustable playback speed. Uses the HTML5 Audio API for audio playback and features a dark-mode compatible, minimal design fixed at the bottom of the viewport. Ideal for media and educational platforms requiring embedded audio content.
